description: Redundant individual-member existence tests. 6+5 individual Has*Member tests for Position and IndividualOrder are fully subsumed by AllMembersAreExpected tests.
suggestedFix: Remove individual Has*Member tests; keep AllMembersAreExpected.

description: Redundant individual-member tests. 10 Formation + 7 Tactic + 3 TeamAttitude individual Has*Member tests subsumed by AllMembersAreExpected.
suggestedFix: Remove individual Has*Member tests; keep AllMembersAreExpected.

description: 19 individual numeric value tests (one per enum member) should be 3 comprehensive tests matching the pattern used in other test files.
8+6+3 individual Has*Member tests subsumed by MembersHaveCorrectNames tests.
Specialty_And_PlayerPersonality_CanBeUsedTogether and All_Enums_Can_Be_Converted_To_String_And_Back test CLR behavior, not application logic.
suggestedFix: Remove tests that only verify CLR guarantees.

description: Formation_And_Tactic_AndTeamAttitude_CanCoexist assigns enums and asserts identity -- impossible to fail.
AllSkillTypesAndAllSkillLevels_CanBeCreated iterates 160 combinations but SkillType dimension is irrelevant. SkillTypeAndLevel_CanBeUsedTogether tests nothing meaningful.
8 individual SkillType_Has*Member tests subsumed by SkillType_MembersHaveCorrectNames.
4 tests for CLR enum ToString/cast behavior.
suggestedFix: Remove tests that only verify CLR guarantees.

description: 6 tests for CLR enum ToString/cast behavior.
suggestedFix: Remove tests that only verify CLR guarantees.

description: 3 tests for Enum.Parse throwing on invalid input (CLR guarantee).
3 distinctness tests using HashSet that cannot catch the actual concern (duplicate int values).
suggestedFix: Replace with int-value uniqueness assertions if needed.

description: 3 individual SkillLevel_Level*Exists tests subsumed by comprehensive tests.
3 display name tests subsumed by GetDisplayName_Progression_IsMonotonic.
Enum with 20 members named Level1-Level20 where an int with range validation would be simpler, but may be mandated by the implementation plan.
suggestedFix: Consider if plan mandates enum; if not, a range-validated int may be simpler.
